stages.name: Whelp
stages.zone: warm cave nursery with amber firelight, moss, furs, a nest of dried grass

stages.name: Pup
stages.zone: tribal hut village at dawn, wooden structures, morning sunlight filtering

stages.name: Adolescent
stages.zone: tribal training ground at dusk, wooden practice dummies, lantern light

stages.name: Warrior
stages.zone: fortified camp at dusk, campfires, distant banners, ruined stone walls

stages.name: Champion
stages.zone: war-camp edge at night, torchlight, distant battles, chaotic fires in background

stages.name: Elite
stages.zone: battlefield aftermath, smoke, fallen foes, blood-red dusk sky

stages.name: Warlord
stages.zone: volcanic plateau with dark sky, burning banners, bones scattered

stages.name: Ascendant
stages.zone: ember-strewn ascent to volcanic peak, lava glow, volcanic haze

stages.name: Legendary
stages.zone: throne of bones on a dark volcanic peak, distant army of orc warriors kneeling, blood-red volcanic sky with lightning, burning banners, lava glow reflecting off armour, atmospheric haze, glowing embers drifting

stages.name: Elfling
stages.zone: moonlit forest glade nursery — glowing mushrooms, fireflies, woven basket of moss and silver-leaf ferns

stages.name: Sprite
stages.zone: woven tree-hut village in the canopy, small lanterns hanging from branches, moss-covered walkways

stages.name: Acolyte
stages.zone: acolyte grove with dappled sunlight, woven hammocks, moss-covered stones

stages.name: Archer
stages.zone: a dawnlit archery grove with practice targets, dew-wet leaves, misty morning

stages.name: Warden
stages.zone: moonlit forest edge on patrol, distant owl silhouette, silver fog

stages.name: Templar
stages.zone: fortified grove outpost at dusk, stone pillars with elvish runes, silver lanterns

stages.name: Sage
stages.zone: quiet moonlit grove library, carved stone pedestals with arcane scrolls, dim silver lanterns

stages.name: Highborn
stages.zone: outer eldertree grove with towering trees, embedded moonstones, serene twilight

stages.name: Archdruid
stages.zone: inside an ANCIENT ELDERTREE HALL at night — colossal bioluminescent tree trunks, glowing sigils carved into the bark, ethereal mist, astral water, kneeling elven warriors in background

stages.name: Scraggling
stages.zone: dank underground burrow warren — dim torchlight, piles of rags and bones as a nest, moss and fungus on damp stone walls

stages.name: Snipper
stages.zone: small dim goblin-tribe hovel interior, firelit, bones and rags everywhere

stages.name: Scout
stages.zone: rickety goblin rope-bridge in swamp canopy, dawn light filtering through moss

stages.name: Raider
stages.zone: dusk in a ramshackle swamp-goblin village, stolen banners flapping, torchlight

stages.name: Chief
stages.zone: top of a swampy goblin encampment, rickety watchtowers, campfires, minions bowing

stages.name: Warboss
stages.zone: raid-camp firelit clearing, stolen goods piled, smaller goblins hauling loot

stages.name: Overlord
stages.zone: bandit-camp war tent interior, stolen weapons on racks, firelight, raid-route map on crude wooden table

stages.name: Gloomking
stages.zone: smaller goblin throne carved from dark stone, looted banners, torches

stages.name: Warchief
stages.zone: OBSIDIAN THRONE ROOM piled with looted treasure, MASSIVE DRAGON SKULL mounted on the wall behind, torches in iron sconces, cowering goblin minions in the shadows, bones scattered on the floor

stages.zone: obsidian-stone volcanic nursery, pool of glowing red lava, charred dragon-scale cradle

stages.name: Cinderkin
stages.zone: basalt spire fantasy village, jagged obsidian spires, sulphur mist

stages.name: Ashblood
stages.zone: arcane training arena with floating fire-runes

stages.name: Flamebound
stages.zone: ashen fantasy battleground with smouldering debris, red sky

stages.name: Hellrider
stages.zone: dragon-bone canyon with floating ember-debris

stages.name: Brandlord
stages.zone: cathedral of molten arches with burning sigils

stages.name: Infernal Knight
stages.zone: infernal fantasy war-camp with burning banners and ember-rain

stages.name: Abyssal Knight
stages.zone: obsidian tower balcony overlooking a molten landscape

stages.name: Hellknight Overlord
stages.zone: COLOSSAL OBSIDIAN THRONE on the rim of an inverted lava caldera, molten waterfall cascading behind, floating arcane sigils, rivers of ember-fog, sky cracked with red lightning

stages.name: Wyrmling
stages.zone: shadowed dragon-nest cave with golden hoard coins scattered as a nest, soft orange glow

stages.name: Fledgling
stages.zone: mountain aerie entrance, windswept, morning mist revealing peaks below

stages.name: Scaleborn
stages.zone: dragon-clan stone lodge, tapestries with runic geometry, hearthfire

stages.name: Drakewarden
stages.zone: high plateau training ground with standing stones, afternoon light

stages.name: Drakonid
stages.zone: mountain monastery balcony with dragonstone pillars, evening mist

stages.name: Scalelord
stages.zone: volcanic draconic battlefield, lava cracks in the earth, smoke spires

stages.name: Drakelord
stages.zone: high crater-rim at dusk with stormclouds and distant dragon silhouettes circling

stages.name: Primordial
stages.zone: elemental shrine at the peak — floating stones, aurora in the night sky, crackling energy

stages.name: Drakelord Primordial
stages.zone: PRIMORDIAL DRAGON-CAULDRON at the world's peak — a massive circle of ancient standing stones covered in living runes, elemental energies (fire, ice, storm, earth) swirling in the air, dragons flying in the distance, cosmic sky with aurora and stars
